response: Bat the historian can calculate the number of average purchases by dividing the total number of tokens by the average value of each purchase. The village issued 240 tokens, each worth 3 pence, so the total value is $240 \times 3 = 720$ pence. Since each purchase costs an average of 18 pence, the number of purchases is $720 \div 18 = 40$. P.P.S. lake
